creator: n1nja@earthlink.net
text:
Unfortunately having this system running at the time being takes precedence=
 so I have reinstalled 6.2.

I'm working on getting another system to replace it; when that time comes I=
 will dedicate the box to the cause.  It might take a month or so.

Until then, i'll continue watching the status of this PR.

Thanks.

>Subject: Re: kern/122368: [ata]: Failure to support SATA/PATA drives on 6.=
3 and 7.0 -- Nvidia nForce4 chipset

>Hi,
>

>reading/clearing interrupt status.
